use_cases: Music streaming applications with playback controls and progress tracking
Podcast players with shuffle and repeat functionality
Audio-based course players for educational platforms
Voice memo applications with visual feedback
Background audio players for content creator websites
ai_summary: A sleek dark-themed audio player component with gradient accents and interactive controls including play/pause, skip, shuffle, and repeat functionality. Features a custom animated progress slider for seeking, time display, and optional cover art and title display. Built with framer-motion for smooth animations and includes hover effects on control buttons.
